title: isodon phyllopodus
intro: Isodon phyllopodus, also known as Himalayan isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Isodon phyllopodus include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower fever and alleviate headaches. Isodon phyllopodus is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which are typically brewed from the plant's leaves and stems.
